title: Verify API health endpoint returns success
expected_result: Health endpoint returns a successful response

title: Verify unauthorized API request is rejected
expected_result: API returns unauthorized or forbidden response

title: Verify required field validation
steps: Submit payload with missing required field
expected_result: API returns validation error with field details

title: Verify invalid field type validation
steps: Submit payload with invalid data type

title: Verify pagination response shape
expected_result: Response includes items and pagination metadata

title: Verify idempotent retry behavior
steps: Validate duplicate side effects are prevented
expected_result: Second request does not create duplicate resource

title: Verify rate limit response handling
expected_result: Client receives rate-limit response with retry guidance

title: Verify audit correlation id is returned
expected_result: Correlation id is preserved for traceability

title: Verify report artifact metadata
expected_result: Report includes JSON, HTML, JUnit, and logs metadata

title: Verify failed execution blocks publishing
expected_result: Remote publish is skipped until execution passes
